center.name: Jan Sztolcman
center.summary: Jan Sztolcman是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括秘魯鸊鷉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Junin grebe (Podiceps taczanowskii), also known as Junin flightless grebe or puna grebe, is a flightless species of grebe endemic to Lake Junin in the Andean highlands of Junin in west-central Peru
